name: Marinated Thai Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the marinade by combining lemon grass, lime leaf, garlic, scallions, sugar, chili paste, curry powder, turmeric, and hot red pepper in a bowl.
2. Add salt to taste.
3. Place the steaks in a shallow dish or sealable plastic bag and pour the marinade over them.
4. Turn off the heat source (e.g., stove).
5. Allow the steaks to marinate for at least 30 minutes, or up to several hours for more flavor.
6. When ready to cook, grill or pan-fry the steaks until desired doneness is reached.
7. Serve hot with any remaining sauce.
